generated_exposure.exposure_text: I get why people worry about civil defense spending, but let's be real - we've seen what happens when we're not prepared. My sister's in emergency management and she says the new local preparedness programs are making a real difference. Yes, it's an investment, but isn't that better than being caught off guard? #CommunitySafety #PreparedNotScared
